CREATE TABLE profiles (section_name VARCHAR(255), sample_time_ms INT, execution_flag INT);
INSERT INTO profiles (section_name, sample_time_ms, execution_flag) VALUES ('sectionA', 100, 0);
INSERT INTO profiles (section_name, sample_time_ms, execution_flag) VALUES ('sectionB', 200, 1);
INSERT INTO profiles (section_name, sample_time_ms, execution_flag) VALUES ('sectionC', 150, 2);
INSERT INTO profiles (section_name, sample_time_ms, execution_flag) VALUES ('sectionD', 250, 4);
INSERT INTO profiles (section_name, sample_time_ms, execution_flag) VALUES ('sectionE', 0, 0);
INSERT INTO profiles (section_name, sample_time_ms, execution_flag) VALUES ('sectionF', -5, 1);
INSERT INTO profiles (section_name, sample_time_ms, execution_flag) VALUES ('sectionG', 1000, 2);
INSERT INTO profiles (section_name, sample_time_ms, execution_flag) VALUES (NULL, 300, 0);
INSERT INTO profiles (section_name, sample_time_ms, execution_flag) VALUES ('sectionH', 150, NULL);
SELECT section_name, SUM(sample_time_ms) AS total_sample_time FROM profiles GROUP BY section_name;
SELECT section_name, AVG(sample_time_ms) AS average_sample_time FROM profiles WHERE execution_flag = 0 GROUP BY section_name;
SELECT p1.section_name FROM profiles p1 JOIN profiles p2 ON p1.execution_flag = p2.execution_flag WHERE p1.sample_time_ms < p2.sample_time_ms;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS successful_calls FROM profiles WHERE execution_flag = 0;
SELECT * FROM profiles WHERE sample_time_ms IN (SELECT MAX(sample_time_ms) FROM profiles) AND execution_flag < 4;
SELECT p1.section_name, p1.sample_time_ms FROM profiles p1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM profiles p2 WHERE p1.execution_flag = p2.execution_flag AND p2.sample_time_ms > 100);
